g.title: acq.edi_account:provider->acq.provider:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (provider) REFERENCES acq.provider(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.edi_message:account->acq.edi_account:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (account) REFERENCES acq.edi_account(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.provider:edi_default->acq.edi_account:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (edi_default) REFERENCES acq.edi_account(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
